title: Algebra Revision Pack
subject: Mathematics

keyConcepts.definition: An equation where variables have power one and form a straight line relationship.
The rate of change of y with respect to x in a linear function.
The value where a line crosses an axis.
Writing an expression as a product of simpler expressions.
A set of equations solved together to find shared variable values.

sections.title: Core Linear Concepts
sections.summary: Covers slope, intercept form, and graph interpretation with short practice checks.

sections.title: Equation Solving Practice
sections.summary: Builds fluency in one-step and multi-step transformations and validates with substitution.

sections.title: Applications
sections.summary: Uses word problems to map real scenarios into equations and verify solutions.

notes: One source file was truncated during import to fit character budget.
